ads.hook: Authority claim: thousands of 5-star reviews front and center
ads.format: plain offer, social proof static image
ads.metric: running 13+ months (393-day category average, median 394 days)

ads.hook: Real customer describes how daily routine changed her life
Real athlete in unscripted workout — looks like an organic post
ads.metric: running 8+ months (documented multi-year continuous Meta presence)

ads.hook: The Secret to Glowing Skin — ingredient close-up visual
ads.format: plain offer, single static image with bold copy
ads.metric: running 6+ months (named top-duration ad in 500-beauty-ad study)

ads.hook: UGC creator applies product — real texture, real result shown
ads.metric: running 6+ months (longest ad duration among top beauty performers)

ads.hook: Swipe to see all styles — fast outfit transitions, no voiceover
ads.metric: running 5+ months (fashion carousel is longest-surviving format in niche)

ads.hook: Happy dog close-up — product subtly in frame, emotion first
ads.format: plain product offer, lifestyle static image
ads.metric: running 4+ months (pet DTC documented sustained Meta category)

ads.hook: Jarring visual pattern-interrupt — product doing something unexpected
ads.format: plain offer, ASMR-style close-up product image
ads.metric: running 4+ months (home goods visual-interrupt hook dominates 61% of survivors)

ads.hook: Tired of chunky protein shakes? Real user blends at the gym
ads.metric: running 6+ months (documented sustained TikTok + Meta paid presence)

ads.hook: Creator applies moisturizer — real before/after glow effect shown
ads.format: UGC demo, TikTok Shopping Ad with in-app checkout
ads.metric: running 5+ months (documented sustained TikTok beauty category winner)

ads.hook: Dermatologist explains each light color — spa results at home
ads.format: educational demo, expert + UGC testimonial hybrid
ads.metric: running 4+ months (nearly 1M 5-star reviews cited; sustained TikTok paid ads)

strategies: Supplement static image ads now run 13+ months avg — launch one authority-claim image and hold it.
Match hook type to niche: pain-point for fitness, authority claim for supplements, visual interrupt for home.
Fashion carousels (4–8 cards showing variants) survive longer than any other format in that niche.
UGC that looks organic beats polished ads in every category — shoot on phone, keep it native.
Let organic winners prove themselves first, then put paid spend behind them to extend lifespan.
summary: The longest-running ads across Meta and TikTok share three traits: they solve a clear, felt problem; they use a format native to the platform (static image on Meta, UGC video on TikTok); and they match their hook exactly to category psychology — authority claims for supplements, visual interrupts for home goods, and outcome-first UGC for fitness and beauty. Supplement ads lead all categories with a documented median of 393–394 days live, proving that compliance-friendly, testimonial-driven creative engineered to avoid fatigue can run profitably for well over a year. The core strategic insight is that longevity = profitability: nobody sustains ad spend on a loser, so the oldest still-running ad in any competitor's library is the single most reliable signal of what actually converts.
